kinyarwanda.the_earliest_fraction_notation_dates_t: Inyandiko ya mbere y'igice iva muri Egiputa ya kera hafi ya 1800 BCE. Abanyegiputa bakoresheje "ibice by'unite" — gusa ibice bifite umubare wo hejuru 1 (nka 1/2, 1/3, 1/4). Banditse igice icyo ari cyo cyose nk'igiteranyo cy'ibice by'unite: 2/5 = 1/3 + 1/15. Inyandiko y'umurongo ya none (umubare wo hejuru hejuru y'umubare wo hasi) iva ku bahanga mu mibare b'Abarabu bo hagati hafi ya 1200 CE.
kinyarwanda.numerator_comes_from_the_latin_numerar: "Numerator" iva mu Kilatini "numerare" (kubara) — ibara ibice bingahe. "Denominator" iva mu "denominare" (kwita) — yita ubunini bw'ibice. Hamwe: umubare wo hasi wita ubwoko bw'ibice; umubare wo hejuru ubara ibice bingahe muri ibyo ufite.
kinyarwanda.decimals_as_we_know_them_were_populari: Decimal nk'uko tuyizi yakwirakwijwe na Simon Stevin mu 1585 mu gitabo cye "De Thiende" (Icya Cumi). Mbere y'ibyo, ibice byari bwo buryo bwonyine bwo kwerekana imibare ituzuye. Akadomo ka decimal kemewe ku isi yose gusa mu myaka ya 1700.
kinyarwanda.percent_comes_from_the_latin_per_centu: "Percent" iva mu Kilatini "per centum" — "kuri ijana." Bityo 25% bisobanura 25 kuri 100, cyangwa 25/100. Ikimenyetso % cyakuze kiva ku magambo magufi "per c." mu nyandiko z'ubucuruzi z'Abataliyani zo mu kinyejana cya 15.
kinyarwanda.the_reciprocal_of_a_b_is_b_a_flip_it_u: Reciprocal ya a/b ni b/a — hindukiza. Buri gice kitari zeru gifite reciprocal. Igiterekano cy'igice na reciprocal yacyo buri gihe ni 1: (3/4) × (4/3) = 12/12 = 1. Ni yo mpamvu kugabanya n'igice ari kimwe no kugwiza na reciprocal yacyo.
kinyarwanda.1_2_is_the_most_common_fraction_in_eve: 1/2 ni igice gisanzwe cyane mu magambo ya buri munsi kuko kiri hagati neza ya 0 na 1. Ni na cyo gice cyonyine tuvuga mu magambo: "kimwe cya kabiri" aho kuvuga "kimwe hejuru ya kabiri." Indimi zindi zifite amagambo yihariye ku 1/3 na 1/4 nazo (kimwe cya gatatu, kimwe cya kane).
kinyarwanda.a_pizza_is_a_perfect_fraction_model_be: Pizza ni icyitegererezo cy'igice gitunganye kuko ari uruziga (bityo ibice byose biva mu kirimbo), ibice byoroshye kubara, kandi icyitegererezo gihuye n'ibisobanuro by'imibare bifite: igice n/d ni n ibice bingana muri byose d ibice bingana.
kinyarwanda.some_numbers_like_and_2_cannot_be_writ: Imibare imwe, nka π na √2, ntishobora kwandikwa nk'igice cy'imibare ibiri yuzuye. Iyi yitwa imibare itagira ishingiro. Aba-Pythagore (hafi ya 500 BCE) bavuga ko bishe umuhanga mu mibare Hippasus igihe yagaragazaga ko √2 idashobora kwandikwa nk'igice.
kinyarwanda.any_real_number_can_be_written_as_a_co: Umubare nyawo uwo ari wo wose ushobora kwandikwa nk'"igice gikomeza" — igice kiri imbere nka 1 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + 1/(2 + ...))). Ibi bitanga ibigereranyo by'igice byiza cyane. π ≈ 22/7 kuva ku magambo make ya mbere; icyiza cyane ni 355/113.
kinyarwanda.musical_pitch_ratios_are_fractions_the: Imibare y'ijwi ry'umuzika ni ibice. Octave ni umubare 2:1 (frequency yikuba kabiri). Icya gatanu gitunganye ni 3:2. Icya gatatu kinini ni 5:4. Pythagoras yavumbuye ko imibare y'imibare yuzuye yoroshye itanga amajwi ahuza.
kinyarwanda.two_pizzas_can_only_be_combined_if_the: Pizza ebyiri zishobora guhuzwa gusa niba zaciwe mu bice by'ubunini bumwe. Umubare wo hasi utandukanye = ibice by'ubunini butandukanye = ntibishobora guhuzwa ako kanya. Umubare wo hasi uhuriweho bisobanura neza "ibice by'ubunini bumwe."
kinyarwanda.a_batting_average_like_333_means_1_3_o: Impuzandengo yo gukubita nka .333 bisobanura 1/3 by'ibikubitwa bitanga igikubita. ERA y'uwoherereza, ku ijana bwo kuba-ku-base, ku ijana bwo gukubita — byose ni ibice. Baseball ni wo mukino wa mbere wamamaje ubwoko bw'iki gitekerezo cy'imibare, guhera mu myaka ya 1850.
kinyarwanda.georges_cuisenaire_was_a_belgian_prima: Georges Cuisenaire yari umwarimu w'amashuri abanza w'Umubiligi mu myaka ya 1950 wakoze inkoni z'amabara zifite uburebure 1 kugeza 10 kugira ngo afashe abana gufata isano y'imibare harimo ibice. "Urukuta rw'igice" ubona mu mashuri menshi ni umwana wa digital w'inkoni ze zifatika.
kinyarwanda.the_chinese_mathematical_text_nine_cha: Inyandiko y'imibare y'Ubushinwa "Ibice Icyenda ku Buhanga bw'Imibare" (hafi ya 100 BCE) yari ifite kubara ibice, harimo uburyo bwo gushaka imibare yo hasi ihuriweho ihuye mu mibare n'ibyo twigisha uyu munsi.
kinyarwanda.computers_store_decimal_fractions_in_b: Mudasobwa zibika ibice bya decimal muri binary. Decimal 0.1 ntishobora kwerekanwa neza muri binary — iba igice gisubiramo muri base 2. Ni yo mpamvu 0.1 + 0.2 rimwe na rimwe bitanga 0.30000000000000004 mu ndimi za porogaramu.

kinyarwanda.let_your_number_be_n_the_sequence_n_1_: Reka umubare wawe ube n. Urukurikirane: (n+1) × 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n + 2 + 4 − 6 = 2n. Gabanya na 2 → n. Kuraho iy'umwimerere → 0. Tegereza — ibyo bitanga 0, atari 1. Gerageza: n → (n+1)×2 = 2n+2 → +4 = 2n+6 → −6 = 2n → ÷2 = n → −iy'umwimerere = 0. "Uburiganya" bwishingikiriza ku ma-constant yihishe mu rukurikirane.
kinyarwanda.each_term_is_half_the_previous_the_tot: Buri jambo ni kimwe cya kabiri cy'iryabanje. Igiteranyo cyegera 1 ariko ntikigera na rimwe. Uru ni urukurikirane rwa geometric rutagira iherezo rufite ijambo rya mbere 1/2 n'umubare 1/2: S = (1/2) / (1 − 1/2) = 1. Ni yo mpamvu paradox y'imyitozo ya Zeno ishobora gukemurwa mu mibare.
kinyarwanda.even_though_each_term_is_small_the_ser: Nubwo buri jambo ari rito, urukurikirane rurasakara. Kugira ngo urenge 100, ukeneye hafi 1.5 × 10^43 amagambo. Ibi byagaragajwe na Nicole Oresme mu myaka ya 1300 akoresheje gukusanya: 1/3 + 1/4 > 1/4 + 1/4 = 1/2; 1/5+...+1/8 > 4 × 1/8 = 1/2; ushobora buri gihe gushaka 1/2 iyindi yo kongeraho.
kinyarwanda.check_1_4_and_1_3_4_1_1_3_1_check_2_5_: Reba 1/4 na 1/3: (4)(1) − (1)(3) = 1. Reba 2/5 na 1/2: (5)(1) − (2)(2) = 1. Iyi mico ikora igiti cya Stern-Brocot cy'imibare yose ya rationnel.
kinyarwanda.rewrite_1_2_2_3_3_4_n_1_n_the_2_in_2_3: Ongera wandike: 1/2 × 2/3 × 3/4 × ... × (n−1)/n. 2 muri 2/3 isiba 2 mu mubare wo hasi wa 1/2. 3 muri 3/4 isiba 3 mu mubare wo hasi wa 2/3. Byose birasibwa uretse 1/n.
kinyarwanda.mathematical_tricks_that_are_really_el: "Uburiganya" bw'imibare buri koko ari ibiranga by'igice byiza. Hitamo bumwe kugira ngo urebe iteguriro, kwerekana, n'ibisobanuro by'imibare.
